svg.title: Synalux POS — taxes
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for taxes. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Configure tax rates per jurisdiction. Assign zones to revenue centers.
Germany | 7% reduced rate for restaurant services
US: subtotal x rate = tax (added to total)
Each zone must be linked to one or more revenue centers.
Configure in Floor Plans -> Revenue Center settings
Per-item: tax calculated on each line item individually (rounding per line)
Per-order: tax calculated on order subtotal (fewer rounding issues)
When ON, new items default to inclusive pricing. Can be overridden per zone.
Synalux POS | Tax Configuration | pos_tax_zones -- multi-jurisdiction, compound, VAT inclusive -- no hardcodes
